<h3 align="center">myClaude</h3>

<p align="center">
  <strong>Your Claude. Extended by everyone.</strong>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <a href="https://myclaude.sh">Marketplace</a> ·
  <a href="https://github.com/myclaude-sh/myclaude-creator-engine">Studio Engine</a> ·
  <a href="https://www.npmjs.com/package/@myclaude-cli/cli">CLI</a>
</p>

---

Claude is powerful out of the box. But *your* Claude — configured, specialized, extended with tools built by people who understand your domain — that's something else entirely.

**myClaude** is an open ecosystem where Claude Code users build, validate, and share tools that make each other's setups smarter. Not pre-built configs to copy. Real expertise, structurally verified, installable with one command.

### The Ecosystem

| Component | What It Does |
|:----------|:-------------|
| **[Studio Engine](https://github.com/myclaude-sh/myclaude-creator-engine)** | Create, validate, and publish Claude Code products — 15 commands, 13 product types, 20 quality patterns |
| **[CLI](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@myclaude-cli/cli)** | Search, install, and manage products from the terminal |
| **[Marketplace](https://myclaude.sh)** | Browse and install with one command — 39+ products live |

### Get Started

```bash
myclaude studio
```

Then open Claude Code and run `/onboard`. The engine adapts to who you are — developer, consultant, researcher, writer. No coding required.

### Contributing

The most valuable contribution is a [friction report](https://github.com/myclaude-sh/myclaude-creator-engine/issues/new?template=friction_report.yml) — tell us where something felt wrong. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](https://github.com/myclaude-sh/myclaude-creator-engine/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md).
